final:
module RefModule(
	output reg [7:0] BRegister_out,
	input [7:0] BRegister_in,
	input lb_,
	input clk,
	input clr_
	);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt)
		if(~clr_) BRegister_out <= 8'b0;
		else if(~lb_) BRegister_out <= BRegister_in;	

endmodule
